_comment: COPY this to docs/site/center/center.config.json at adoption and fill it. This is the ONE file that carries a project's bindings out of the generator source: identity, the paths the loaders read, the test corpora, the leaf reports, the capture commands, and one block per adopted entity. The generators read ONLY from here + adoption.json (the entity registry). Every `entities` key MUST be a slug registered in adoption.json — an unknown slug aborts the build (the D123 rule). See center.config.example.json for a filled-in worked example.
_commands_comment: Capture commands run by scripts/refresh_center.sh <mode>, one shell line per entry, from the repo root. `regen` (the default) never runs a suite.
_entities_comment: One block per entity registered in adoption.json. `test_rx` is required (it claims test files into the corpus matrix even before a section is built); `proofs`/`code`/`models` are added when the entity's section is adopted and its feature page is built.
